files.justification: Legacy validation analyzer over the soft limit. Do not grow it; split during the next validation refactor.
Legacy broad plugin analyzer tests over the soft limit. New analyzer tests should be split into focused files.

folders.justification: Existing compiler component folder over the folder limit. New compiler areas should use focused subdirectories.
Existing core model folder over the folder limit. New core subsystems should be grouped into subdirectories.
Existing hosting folder is one file over the limit. Keep future additions grouped by host concern.
Existing analyzer implementation folder over the folder limit. New analyzer pieces should be grouped by concern.
Existing plugin runtime folder over the folder limit. New plugin runtime areas should move into subdirectories.
Existing verifier folder includes generated verifier support. New verifier areas should be grouped into subdirectories.
Legacy monolithic test project folder. New tests should be split into focused subdirectories when practical.
Existing small tool uses many focused files in one folder. Revisit if the tool grows further.

rootFolders.justification: Existing example project keeps scenarios as sibling files. New examples should use subdirectories when the root grows.
Existing compiler project root predates the project-folder limit. New compiler implementation files should move into subdirectories.
Existing core project root predates the project-folder limit. New core implementation files should be grouped into subdirectories.
Existing hosting project root predates the project-folder limit. New hosting implementation files should be grouped by concern.
Existing interpreter project root has a small legacy overage. Split new interpreter concerns into subdirectories.
Existing analyzer project root predates the project-folder limit. New analyzer implementation files should be grouped into subdirectories.
Existing plugin project root predates the project-folder limit. New plugin implementation files should use subdirectories.
Existing runtime project root predates the project-folder limit. New runtime binding groups should move into subdirectories.
Existing JSON serialization project root predates the project-folder limit. New serialization concerns should be grouped into subdirectories.
Existing HTTP transport project root predates the project-folder limit. New transport concerns should use subdirectories.
Existing validation project root predates the project-folder limit. New validation implementation files should be grouped into subdirectories.
Existing verifier project root predates the project-folder limit. New verifier concerns should use subdirectories.
Legacy monolithic test project root predates the project-folder limit. New tests should move into focused subdirectories where practical.
Existing tool project root predates the project-folder limit. Split future AgentQueue growth into subdirectories.
